name: agentix-embed-code-ts
description: nomic-embed-code int8 weights in a TypeScript npm package — pure-TS incbin-style inference

scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:node && npm run build:web && npm run build:cli
scripts.ci: npm run build && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run test:unit:coverage && node scripts/ci-coverage-check.js --tier unit --verbose
scripts.ci:local: npm run build && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run test:unit:coverage && node scripts/ci-coverage-check.js --tier unit --verbose
scripts.ci:full: npm run build:all && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run test:unit:coverage && node scripts/ci-coverage-check.js --tier unit --verbose && npm run test:coverage && node scripts/ci-coverage-check.js --tier integration --verbose
scripts.precommit: npm run lint && npm run format:check
